iot.topicrule.stepfunctionsaction.Execut.Description: (Optional) A name will be given to the state machine execution consisting of this prefix followed by a UUID. Step Functions automatically creates a unique name for each state machine execution if one is not provided.

iot.topicrule.stepfunctionsaction.RoleAr.Description: The ARN of the role that grants IoT permission to start execution of a state machine ("Action":"states:StartExecution").

iot.topicrule.stepfunctionsaction.StateM.Description: The name of the Step Functions state machine whose execution will be started.
